headline: Agilent (A) Opens China Innovation Center And Buys Biocare For Cancer Diagnostics
summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) plans to open a new China Innovation Center focused on digital, AI, and automation research and development. The company also announced the acquisition of Biocare to expand its presence in cancer diagnostics. These initiatives mark an expansion into areas tied to advanced technology and healthcare testing. Agilent Technologies enters this phase of expansion with its stock trading at $127.06 and a value score of 5. The share price is up 10.7% over the past 30...
